Nodes.PromptTemplate: You are a document processor. Split the following document into 3 logical sections and output each section as-is.
Summarize SECTION 1 (Introduction) in 2-3 sentences. Focus on the main thesis and scope.
Summarize SECTION 2 (Current Landscape) in 2-3 sentences. Include key statistics and examples.
Summarize SECTION 3 (Future Outlook) in 2-3 sentences. Highlight the most important predictions.
Combine the three section summaries into a single coherent executive summary (5-7 sentences). Ensure smooth transitions between sections and end with a key takeaway.
